description.text: Go across, under, over, or alongside to take the bridge and secure victory. Two Cubes and a Base.

de.original: Go across, under, over, or alongside to take the bridge and secure victory. Two Cubes and a Base.
de.translation: Nehmt die Brücke ein und sichert euch den Sieg! Zwei Generatoren und eine Basis.

es.original: Go across, under, over, or alongside to take the bridge and secure victory. Two Cubes and a Base.
es.translation:
Por arriba, por abajo o cruza el puente.
Dos generadores y un núcleo.

ru.original: Go across, under, over, or alongside to take the bridge and secure victory. Two Cubes and a Base.
ru.translation: Чтобы захватить мост и победить, пройдите по нему, под ним, над ним или вдоль него. Два куба и база.

pt.original: Go across, under, over, or alongside to take the bridge and secure victory. Two Cubes and a Base.
pt.translation: Vá por cima, por baixo ou pelas laterais para tomar a ponte e assegurar a vitória. Dois Cubos e uma Base.

fr.original: Go across, under, over, or alongside to take the bridge and secure victory. Two Cubes and a Base.
fr.translation: Traversez l'arène par tous les moyens pour prendre le pont et rafler la victoire ! Deux cubes et une base.
